name: Eleanor Whitfield
background: Widowed and recently started managing finances on her own. Struggles with online banking and frequently mixes up her account types and what a 'transfer' versus a 'payment' means.

name: Darnell Hayes
tone: angry and impatient, raises his voice
background: Runs a busy small business and is furious that a hold on a customer's check has left him unable to make payroll. Has little patience for process and wants the problem fixed now.

name: Mei-Ling Tan
background: Highly tech-savvy and reads the fine print. Asks pointed questions about fees, APRs, and security, and will push back if an answer seems inconsistent.

name: Abdirahman Yusuf
tone: earnest, second-language English with occasional phrasing slips
background: Emigrated five years ago and is still learning some banking terminology. Sometimes needs terms explained and re-confirms details to make sure he understood correctly.

name: Brett Caldwell
tone: smooth and overly friendly, name-drops authority
background: A practiced social engineer who opens warmly, then leans on flattery, fake urgency, and claims of being a 'VIP client' to try to get verification waived or contact details changed.

name: Priya Raghunathan
background: Applying for her first auto loan and worried about being rejected or trapped by terms she does not understand. Over-explains her situation and seeks reassurance at each step.

name: Walter Brzezinski
background: Distrusts automated systems and fraud everywhere after a friend was scammed. Reluctant to share information and demands to know why each question is being asked.

name: Sofia Reyes
background: Juggles personal and business accounts and calls during the lunch rush. Knows what she wants, lists tasks rapidly, and gets annoyed by repetition.

name: Tyrone Bishop
background: On the road constantly and often can't remember which card or account a charge hit. Tends to drift off-topic with stories before circling back to the actual request.

name: Hannah Goldberg
background: Manages a nonprofit's accounts and personal finances. Careful with documentation and asks for written confirmations she can file.

name: Rajesh Patel
background: Watches every dollar and disputes nearly every fee. Will keep pushing for a waiver or a better rate well past the point most customers stop.

name: Chloe Beaumont
background: Lives paycheck to paycheck with her first checking account. Doesn't fully understand overdraft mechanics and tends to spiral when money gets tight.

name: Gregory Okonkwo
background: Comfortable with formal processes and provides exactly the information requested. Reasonable and cooperative even when there's a problem to resolve.

name: Dolores Marchetti
background: Spent decades doing books for a family business and still reconciles every statement by hand. Notices the smallest discrepancy and wants it explained in full.

name: Kenji Nakamura
background: Irregular freelance income makes cash flow lumpy. Wants quick answers, dislikes upselling, and is wary about how his data is used.

name: Latoya Jefferson
background: Works night shifts and calls between rounds. Patient with reasonable process but has zero tolerance for being bounced around or asked the same thing twice.

name: Sergei Volkov
background: Wants a large international transfer rushed through and gets cagey when asked compliance questions about the counterparty. Hints that delays will cost the bank his business.

name: Amara Diallo
background: New to the bank and exploring savings and CD options. Asks thoughtful follow-up questions and is happy to be guided.

name: Frank Delgado
background: Doesn't always catch what's said the first time and bristles at being asked to repeat himself. Wants things kept simple and short.

name: Yuki Tanaka
background: Recently started her career and keeps her finances by the book. Hesitant to push back but will quietly flag anything that seems off.

name: Marcus Albright
background: Treats support staff as obstacles and invokes his 'private banker' and 'attorney' to extract exceptions. Tries to bypass holds and verification by sheer pressure.

name: Ingrid Larsson
background: Owns a small clinic and handles its banking herself. Cooperative and quick to make decisions once she has the facts.

name: Hassan Karimi
tone: anxious and respectful, occasional ESL phrasing
background: Second-language speaker stretched thin running a 24-hour store. Panics about cash-flow gaps and fees, and sometimes misunderstands financial jargon.

name: Beatrice Nwosu
background: Manages a fixed pension income and has begun forgetting passwords and account details. Wants to be treated with respect and needs steps explained slowly.
